rules.style: bright child-safe meme life-sim mobile game, toy-like 3D cartoon, readable silhouettes, gold 67 accent
rules.story: 67/67 at the top -> betrayed by Banana/Strawberry meme setup -> restart at 1/67 -> comeback through city, deals, skills, home and transport
